title: Communauté d'agglomération de la Provence Verte
summary: Communauté d'agglomération de la Provence Verte is an intercommunal structure, centred on the cities of Brignoles and Saint-Maximin-la-Sainte-Baume. It is located in the Var department, in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region, southeastern France. It was created in January 2017. Its seat is in Brignoles. Its area is 947.5 km2. Its population was 98,529 in 2017, of which 17,179 in Brignoles proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération de la Provence Verte is an intercommunal structure, centred on the cities of Brignoles and Saint-Maximin-la-Sainte-Baume. It is located in the Var department, in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region, southeastern France. It was created in January 2017. Its seat is in Brignoles. Its area is 947.5 km2. Its population was 98,529 in 2017, of which 17,179 in Brignoles proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 28 communes:
